prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软 科主榜2026年约第35名，近年排名稳定在第33–36名区间，属于顶尖211层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及学术不端事件（伪造成绩单和抄袭学位论文），但影 响范围有限；抖音综合热度排名全国第1（高热），短视频曝光量极高，反映报考关注度持续升温；冶金工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、科学技术史A+、环境科学 与工程A-，共4个A-及以上学科，材料、冶金等王牌专业与该校理工特色高度契合。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热，材料科学 与工程（属生化环材大类）仍偏劝退；本省2026年物理类考生约34.7万人，较2025年32.0万人增加约2.7万人（+8.4%），竞争显著加剧；该校位于北京，对湖南考生有较强地域吸引力；本校在湖南招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），属中等偏下水平，非主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移 趋势、2026年小幅缩招、本省物理类考生大幅增加（+8.4%）以及抖音高热反映的报考关注升温，在2025年基准9830名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧；预测最低位次约9724名，区间9 224–10224名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（9224–10224名）内，建议以二档专业为主力选择、一档专业适当冲刺、三档专业稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如9200名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、理 科试验班等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如10200名左右）应以三档材料、能源等专业保底，兼顾二档中等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8710 → 9540 → 9182 → 9478 → 9830, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1120 positions over the past 5 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 9830; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 106, 106, 102, 105, and 113 respectively, increasing to 113 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 110, a slight reduction of about 2.7% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 35th, with stable rankings in the 33–36 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 level; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents (forged transcripts and plagiarized dissertations), but the impact is limited; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 1st nationwide (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention; Metallurgical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, History of Science and Technology A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A-, a total of 4 A- and above disciplines, with materials, metallurgy and other flagship majors highly aligned with the university's engineering characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other popular majors continue to be highly sought after, while Materials Science and Engineering (belonging to the biology, chemistry, environment, materials category) remains relatively discouraged; the province's 2026 Physics Category examinees are approximately 347,000, an increase of about 27,000 (+8.4%) compared to 325,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Hunan examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan is about 2.5% (2024 data), at a moderately low level, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, slight enrollment reduction in 2026, significant increase in provincial Physics Category examinees (+8.4%), and the high Douyin heat reflecting rising application attention, competition is expected to further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 9830; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9724, with a range of 9224–10224.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range (9224–10224), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, appropriately aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 9200), prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Science Experimental Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 10200), use Tier 3 majors such as Materials and Energy as a backup, while also considering Tier 2 moderate majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1953 → 2182 → 2370 → 2427 → 2273, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing, with 2025 moving forward by about 154 places compared to 2024; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 2273; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category from 2021 to 2025 was 20, 20, 20, 19, and 15 students respectively, with a reduction to 15 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18 students, an increase of 20% over 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 35th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities, with strong appeal to liberal arts candidates; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving academic misconduct incidents, but with limited impact; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks first nationally (high heat), overall attention is extremely high; the university is known for engineering, with fewer advantageous disciplines in liberal arts; the Social Sciences Experimental Class includes law, administrative management, etc., with law discipline evaluation not reaching A-, overall liberal arts strength is moderate.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
The social popularity of the law major is hot but differentiated, while foreign language and literature majors are generally lukewarm and wait-and-see; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in the province is approximately 187,000, an increase of about 44,000 (+31.2%) compared to 143,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition.
7. [Regional Factor] The university is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal to Hunan liberal arts candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Hunan's History Category is very small, not a major source of students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the rebound and forward shift of rankings in 2025, a 20% enrollment expansion in 2026, but a 31.2% surge in provincial History Category examinees, the significant increase in examinees is the dominant factor, and competition is expected to intensify further; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2576, with a range of 2190–2962.
